title: Microsoft SharePoint RCE
summary: [P1] CVE-2026-32201 is an improper input validation vulnerability in Microsoft SharePoint Server that allows unauthorized attackers to execute arbitrary code. It is being exploited in the wild with no patch available. Why now: Reported exploitation in the wild without a patch available. (confidence: 0.80)
